name: PARKE BANCORP, INC.
summary: Parke Bancorp, Inc. is a New Jersey bank holding company that operates Parke Bank, a full-service commercial bank chartered by the New Jersey Department of Banking. The Bank offers commercial real estate, residential real estate, and construction lending, along with consumer and commercial loans, deposit products (checking, savings, money market, time deposits), debit cards, internet banking, and online bill payment. It serves individuals and small to mid-sized businesses in Southern New Jersey, the Philadelphia area, and New York, with total assets of $2.25 billion as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Core lending product for small to mid-sized businesses secured primarily by real estate.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: Mortgage lending for individual customers in the Bank's market areas.

products.name: Construction Loans
products.description: Core construction lending product for individuals and businesses.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Loans
products.description: Commercial loan products offered to businesses in the Bank's market areas.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Consumer loan products offered to individual customers.

products.name: Deposit Products
products.description: Checking, savings, money market, time deposits, and other traditional deposit services.

products.name: Internet Banking and Online Bill Payment
products.description: Contemporary digital banking services offered to customers.

products.name: Cannabis Banking Services
products.description: Banking services for state-licensed cannabis growers, processors, dispensaries, and retailers.

products.name: Debit Cards
products.description: Debit card services offered to customers as part of contemporary product offerings.
